title: SheeChung Premium Quality Apothecary Jars - Clear Plastic Storage Jars with Rust Proof Stainless Steel Lids - Bathroom Vanity Countertop Organizer Canister Holder House Decor | Set of 3 (Black)
description:
About this item
✅APOTHECARY JARS - 3 Pack clear plastic Apothecary Jars in 3 Sizes. 1 Pack 50-ounce, 1 Pack 25-ounce and 1 Pack 15-ounce. Multi-sized jars are JUST RIGHT for vanity, bath, and home decor. Made of durable acrylic with metal black lids, the apothecary jars combine BEAUTY and organization.
✅COMPACT STORAGE - Multi-sized jars are FUNCTIONAL in any space. The fun modern, yet space-saving design provides plenty of room for storing a multitude of bathroom essentials:cotton swabs, ovals and rounds, makeup applicators and cosmetic sponges, wedges, guest soaps, bath bombs, balls, salts and more. Organize your hair accessories - holds hair ties, clips, elastic bands, bobby pins, bows and more; Use in home office for paperclips, rubber bands, binder clips, and stamps.
✅PREMIUM QUALITY - Made of durable high quality plastic; Rustproof black metal lid; Easy Care - clean with mild soap and water or wipe clean with a damp cloth. Removable lid and a wide mouth make accessing bathroom necessities and accessories easy and simple. Will not shatter like glass, Safe to use. Safe around kids and lively animals.
✅MAKING HOME A BETTER SPACE - Versatile and easy to use, it will find a place in many rooms of your home,not just for the bathroom, also PERFECT in the kitchen or living room. Keep vanity nice, dry and clean from bathroom humidity. Keep things organized and easy to get. Great for apartments, condos, dorm rooms, RVs and campers. Crystal clear jars with rustic black metal lids gives modern farmhouse look,perfect home decor
✅Multi-sized jars are FUNCTIONAL in any space .SIZE - 50 oz Jar Size: Diameter: 5.1 inch Height: 6.7 inch. 25 oz Jar Size: Diameter: 4 inch Height:5 inch. 15 oz Jar Size: Diameter: 3.4 inch Height:4.2 inch.
reviews_5s:
Bought these last December, through my dad's Amazon acc so even though the review name says DJ, this is his daughter writing this. The apothecary jars arrived in a big Amazon box with several other things we ordered. The Sheechung (the brand) box itself was not wrapped in plastic or bubble wrap in the shipping box, but the jars themselves were individually wrapped in plastic and placed inside each other. On top of that was a soft but thick foam square for padding to protect the top of the largest lid. On top of that foam square was the sheet of labels. My jars had no scratches and the lids were also in perfect condition. They fit easily on the shelves in my bathroom (the PETAFLOP Floating Shelves Wall Mounted Set of 3 Gold Storage Shelf for Bathroom, Bedroom, Living Room, Kitchen - also from Amazon), though the largest jar is practically the exact width of the largest shelf (but it removes easily). The gold color is very nice and compliments other gold items in my bathroom (mirror, towel holder, toilet paper holder etc.) even though they're all from diff sellers. The largest jar took about half a large bag (100 pcs) of cotton balls (could have fit more but I didn't pack it full), the medium jar took roughly half a pack (100 pcs) of cotton pads, and the small jar fit an entire pack of q-tips (300-count). The lids are not screw-type but slip on, however this is not an issue for me as our home doesn't have any kids and only adults would be using these. They sit comfortably on top of each jar and offer only the slightest resistance when being pulled off. They don't scrape the sides of the jars either. The quality of the jars is very good imo, nice and thick and sturdy. The lids are smooth to the touch with no sharp edges or cracks in the finish. I was so happy with my purchase that I purchased a second set a few weeks ago. For the almost $20 price point I think these are a steal of a deal!

Oh, and they wipe clean easy peasy with a soft dry cloth.This is a beautiful,very well made set! Good quality and perfect size to accommodate my bathroom needs as,cotton swab,plastic floss picks and soap bars
The gold color matches the details in my bathroom
Very happy with this purchase!I actually got these for my sister because she saw something similar I had bought locally and use in my guest bathroom. They are great for holding all kinds of items - cotton swabs, decorative rocks/marbles, fancy soaps, cotton balls, etc. They are plastic but have the appearance of glass, so they are lightweight and less likely to break. The lids fit nice and are made of metal with a lovely finish that matches other bronze decor items. There are two different sized items in a pack - really nice for the price, and regular delivery was reasonably fast. Would recommend.These small containers match the other bathroom accessories perfectly. Love that it helps keep the bathroom organized.I needed a little gold accent for our newly remodeled bathroom. Put cotton balls & Qtips in em so they’re both useful & attractive. I dig the multiple sizes. Great buy.Take your bathroom decor up a notch with the stylish jars. I bought a second set for my other bathroom.I like that the jars are hard plastic so that if they get knocked off the counter they won’t break. The lids are a steel-like material. I like the black color of the lids. Able to store cotton round, q-tips and my hair accessories in the large one. Perfect to organize bathroom things.The 3 different size jars arrive quickly in perfect condition. They look like glass but are a heavy plastic with black tops in a shiny color. Black and white labels are included if you want to use them. I used the largest for cotton balls, mid size for Q tips and smallest for dental floss picks. They look nice on my bathroom counter top and tops lift off for easy access.I have these sitting on my bathroom sink to put stuff in. They look really nice. They are a little bit smaller than I expected but I didn’t look at size to carefully. I am pleased.It looks and feels like glass but it's plastic, the lid is great.
reviews_1s:
Play Video
If you’re OK with holding the jar with one hand while opening the lid with the other, then you won’t mind when you’re going to open the container, to keep the glass from dropping back on the counter. I find it annoying when every time I’m reaching reaching for a cotton ball with one hand, that it does this.Looked nice for bit then it started to “tarnish”. It only did it on one so it’s not the humidity in my bathroom. It’s cheap plastic not glass like it appears in the pictures and easily chips.They are pretty. And I really liked the look of them but the Large jar shattered. I put bath salts in it and left them alone. Went to use them a few days later and noticed fine cracks in the plastic. I picked it up and it shattered.Didn’t even last for 2 months. Made out of cheap plastic. I just had a few pods in it and it cracked into 2 pieces. Wish I didn’t waste my money on this.Wish the quality was better for the price, sharp.These are so cheaply made they should be put in a dollhouse. These are the biggest piece of crap I have ever purchased.Got my jars last night and the box was repackaged and the jars were dirty had paint on them and were sticky. So disgusting!The lid came already messed up with a dark colored dent. These are a good size but if you’re looking for perfect these are not it. The jars also came with scratches.I wish both jars came.The big jar had a huge crack in it. Little jar and box was fine.
